context: Russian pop in 2015 was a mature market with TopHit radio charts and digital platforms. Polina Gagarina achieved international recognition finishing second at Eurovision with 'A Million Voices.' The scene blended mainstream pop (Egor Kreed, Loboda), hip-hop (Basta, Mot), and veteran performers (Grigory Leps, Mashina Vremeni).

tracks.title: Ty Ne Takoy (You're Not Like That)
Ty Moya Nezhnost (You Are My Tenderness)
Vybros Iz Golovy (Get It Out of Your Head)
